ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "official_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the data source is official or unofficial */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "geographical_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the state data was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the state data (e.g., census, official records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the election was held */,
  "total_ballots_counted" INTEGER /* Estimated total ballots counted */,
  "votes_for_president" INTEGER /* Votes for the highest office (President) */,
  "vep_turnout_rate" REAL /* Voter turnout rate based on voting-eligible population */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, primary) */,
  "candidates" TEXT /* JSON object containing candidate information */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "voting_methods" TEXT /* JSON object containing information on different voting methods used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "voting_eligible_population" INTEGER /* Total voting-eligible population */,
  "voting_age_population" INTEGER /* Total voting-age population */,
  "non_citizen_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of non-citizens in the voting-age population */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing age distribution of the voting population */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing race distribution of the voting population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing gender distribution of the voting population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the population data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_population_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "felon_data" (
  "felon_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each felon data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "prison_population" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals in prison */,
  "probation_population" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals on probation */,
  "parole_population" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals on parole */,
  "total_ineligible_felons" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals disenfranchised due to felony status */,
  "felony_laws" TEXT /* JSON object containing information on state-specific felony laws affecting voting rights */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the felon data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("felon_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_felon_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overseas_voting" (
  "overseas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overseas voting entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "overseas_eligible" INTEGER /* Total number of overseas eligible voters */,
  "overseas_voting_methods" TEXT /* JSON object containing information on methods used for overseas voting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the overseas voting data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overseas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overseas_voting_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source for election results */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., official, unofficial, census) */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Date the data source was last verified */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user, referencing the user roles table */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* JSON object containing information on users or groups the report was shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which data was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions made by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, bug report) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the feedback (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
